item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description: - Apple Intelligence compatibility - OCR: Image to text extraction - Follow-up conversations with AI - Create New Chats to ask AI anything (Cmd+N) - Clipboard history improvements (pin, search, up to 100 entries) - Shell-compatible custom actions - Community extensions (share via YAML, clipboard install) - Dark mode improvements - UI improvements and bug fixes

item.title: Version 1.3.0
item.description:
Highlights

  • In-process MLX-Swift inference — replaces llama-server, ~15 MB lighter, native streaming, no zombie processes
  • Apple Intelligence support (macOS 26+) — fully on-device, ~36 MB vs ~2 GB RAM
  • Context Snippets v1 — per-app system prompts via ~/.config/cai/snippets.json
  • Type to reveal hidden actions — focused defaults, filter to surface anything

Existing users will be guided through a one-time GGUF → MLX migration on first launch (~1.8 GB download for Ministral 3B).

Full release notes →

item.title: Version 1.2.1
item.description: - New: Connectors (Alpha) — Create GitHub issues and Linear tickets directly from your clipboard - Updated built-in LLM engine (llama-server b8390) - Fixed app icon - Fixed image content detection priority - UI improvements and bug fixes
